description: Full-frame reproduction of Norman Rockwell's 1943 oil painting 'Freedom from Want' (one of his Four Freedoms series), posted by the U.S. Department of Labor as a Thanksgiving holiday post. The painting depicts a multigenerational white American family gathered around a white-tableclothed dinner table; a grandmother in an apron, smiling, sets down a large roast turkey on a platter while a grandfather looks on, and family members of various ages smile and chat around the table set with water glasses, celery, fruit and covered dishes. The artist's signature 'Norman Rockwell' appears in the lower-left corner. There is no added on-image text, slogan, seal, or graphic overlay. The accompanying tweet text credits the painting.
notable_text: Norman Rockwell (signature only; no agency-added on-image text)
